name_en: Mini bag, fits large smartphones like PLUS
name_cn:
Mini bag, fits large smartphones like PLUS
5 X 6 X 4 inches (13.5 X 16 X 10 cm)
Calfskin
Sheepskin lining
Gold hardware
Handheld, shoulder, and crossbody
Leather flap with TRIOMPHE magnetic closure
1 main compartment
Leather handle 2 inches (5 cm) long
1 detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 17 inches (44 cm), max length 23 inches (59 cm)
Item No.: 10N473GHJ.38NO
